title: Selling Luxury Homes in St. Louis
content:
Guide to selling luxury homes in the St. Louis market.

WHY LUXURY SALES REQUIRE DIFFERENT STRATEGIES:
- Smaller buyer pool with higher purchasing power
- Longer selling timelines, highly targeted marketing needed
- Affluent buyers expect excellence: meticulous staging, upscale marketing materials, smart home tech, advanced security

KEY MARKETING STRATEGIES:
- Professional Visuals: twilight shots, drone footage, interior & exterior photos, amenity photography
- Video & Storytelling: high-quality video tours on YouTube, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok
- Digital Advertising: targeted campaigns reaching qualified buyers locally and nationally
- Exclusive Showings: private events, agent previews, vetted showings to protect seller privacy

DISTINCTIVE FEATURES TO HIGHLIGHT:
- Wine cellars, custom pools/spas, guest quarters
- Home entertainment systems, advanced security
- Acreage and distinctive lot characteristics

MARKET CONTEXT:
St. Louis ranked as the top luxury housing market in the U.S. for the third consecutive quarter as of January 2025, attributed to its blend of affordability and long-term potential.
